fields.admin_requirements: Operators can disable fallback RFID debt-account authorization to enforce strict account-linked behavior.
fields.public_requirements: Unknown non-blocked RFID cards can still start charging while debt is tracked against the fallback account.
fields.service_requirements: Unknown RFID tags are auto-enrolled and linked to the fallback service account when strict mode would otherwise reject.
fields.summary: Auto-authorize unknown non-blocked RFIDs by attaching them to a default debt-tracking account.
